prospects.notes: 24 years old. School for firefighting, works at a lab (shifts start 5pm). Girlfriend works at private elementary school in PV. DTM'd today — stoic reaction but positive. Wants something on the side, doesn't know where to start.

prospects.notes: Met April 22 at gym. Referral source — says he knows someone who might be looking. Goal: get the referral's number on today's call.
prospects.next: Follow up tomorrow — get referral's number

prospects.name: Angel
prospects.notes:
26 years old. Flooring contractor, works 5am–5pm. Goal: get contractor's license and build his own contracting business.

DTM done. Said he's open to anything but 'just not at the moment.' Warm — said 'anytime' — but has a real timeline. Don't push before he's ready. Likes to rest on downtime but is genuinely open to opportunities.

Palm Springs this weekend, back Sunday May 11.
prospects.next: Text Tuesday May 13 to check in and set up MG

notes.title: Business Overview
notes.content:
Running an Amway business out of LA. Focus areas:
- EOS Gym contacts (primary source)
- Barber shop clients
- Car meets & social events

Goal: Build consistent income, grow team, hit Silver Producer.

notes.title: DTM Script
notes.content:
DTM = Drop the Mention

Key phrases:
- "Hey I just started a business, I think you'd be perfect for it."
- "Are you open to making extra money on the side?"
- "I'm looking for sharp people — you came to mind."

Always plant seeds. Never chase.

notes.title: May 2026 Focus
notes.content:
Priorities this month:
1. Follow up on all COLD prospects — esp. Enrique, Angel, Ricardo
2. Run MG with Mark and Bo
3. Push Guilbert BP — money objection
4. Get 2 new customers from gym contacts
5. Support Niko — help him close his first customer

Target PV: 300+ personal

notes.title: Product Knowledge
notes.content:
Top sellers:
- XS Energy (all flavors) — great for gym crowd
- Double X — flagship multivitamin
- Cholesterol Health — great for older customers
- Glister Toothpaste — everyday use
- XS Elite Focus — students, entrepreneurs
- Women's Pack — complete health bundle
- Vanilla Protein Shake — gym/fitness crowd

PV averages:
- XS 12-pack: ~50 PV
- Double X: ~45 PV
- Cholesterol Health: ~30 PV

notes.title: Hawkins Training — The Conversation Formula
notes.content:
Formula: Connection → Compliment → Pull the Trigger

Always pay the compliment first — without it, everything is off.
Then tell your story. Then ask the key question and shut up.

notes.title: Hawkins Training — What You Say You Do
notes.content:
Answer #1 (when they ask what you do):
"I have a contractual arrangement online. I drive traffic to the internet and get paid on the back side — anything more than that, we need to sit down."

Answer #2 (one-liner alternatives):
- "Leadership development company — I show people how to build an asset."
- "Business development — I show people how to capitalize on what's happening online."

Rules:
- Only answer ONE question. Do not take the second.
- Do not be afraid to walk away.
- If they push for more: "That's a sit-down conversation."

notes.title: Hawkins Training — Key Phrases & Mindset
notes.content:
Key closing phrase:
"If you're looking, we should sit down and grab a cup of coffee."
→ Then be quiet. Let them respond. They'll tell you if they're looking.

Opener story:
- I own an online model that's been successful.
- I'm in my 20s and I don't work like I used to.
- My business is growing.
- I'm always looking for sharp, ambitious people.
- When I find the right person, I show them how to do what I do.
- KEY: "If you're looking..."

Mindset:
- Be UP. Enthusiasm: 10/10. Simplicity: 10/10.
- Develop an icebreaker. Be where people are.
- If you're nervous — just talk to people.
- If something works, don't change it.
- Conversations are everywhere.
